GRAND RISING UNLIMITED

We provide support for vulnerable kids in academics, athletics and mental health in Lane County, Oregon.
Register Free!
Our Vision

Our Vision
✕
Learn More
Learn More

​​A HEART FOR THOSE WHO NEED IT MOST

OUR MISSION

Grand Rising Unlimited’s mission is to unify and empower youth by expanding opportunities and promoting healthy social, intellectual, physical, psychological, and emotional development through mentoring, coaching, and education to close the opportunity gap.

OUR VISION
BELONGING, IDENTITY, SAFETY.

LOVE FOR ALL. PRIORITIZING THE FEW.

Grand Rising Unlimited was created for the Lane County community to enrich the lives of youth with education, mental health support, athletic and college and career-building opportunities.

Using a holistic approach, we provide community-based, family-based, and mentorship-based programs that empower  youth to create higher standards and develop lifelong skills, while manifesting positive change. 

Grand Rising Unlimited will do this by partnering with local schools, community leaders, academic and athletic organizations, and neighbours to work together in molding and preparing the next generation of leaders. Grand Rising Unlimited believes they can create positive and optimal outcomes for students in the community by instilling proper skills, character, and mental health strengths in its participants.
Learn More

THE GRAND RISING TEAM

From our founder to our volunteers, Grand Rising Unlimited works with people that have a shared vision to improve their communities in lasting ways. Meet the people who bring the vision to life.
Learn More

OUR GROWING PARTNERSHIPS/COLLABORATIONS

​​HAVE QUESTIONS OR IDEAS?

​Interested in joining our mission? Use the form to get in touch, and let’s build a brighter future for our community.

Please be advised that this standard form was created using a Weebly form. The data is captured within the Weebly website builder, and does not automatically flow into the Flipcause system or into any other software.

If you have need for a different type of form, please reach out to your Success Team for more information. You can also learn more about the different types of forms that are available to you by clicking here.
